Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment And Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Alfredo Castillo, Rolando Bucago, Henry VIII Shabu Shabu Restaurant, LLC, Katana-Ya Restaurant & Lounge, LLC and Tokyo Katana-Ya, LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alexei Kuchinsky, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Eric Rivera, Suwaporn Fangsen, Chanthraphak Mongkhonsawat and Pimchanok Senakham, who were placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendants Alfredo Castillo, Rolando Bucago, Henry VIII Shabu Shabu Restaurant, LLC, Katana-Ya Restaurant & Lounge, LLC or Tokyo Katana-Ya, LLC.
Defaults were entered against defendants Alfredo Castillo, Rolando Bucago, Henry VIII Shabu Shabu Restaurant, LLC, Katana-Ya Restaurant & Lounge, LLC or Tokyo Katana-Ya, LLC.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Ensure Marketing Solutions, Inc. was filed on October 26, 2016.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 2, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Eric Rivera, Suwaporn Fangsen, Chanthraphak Mongkhonsawat and Pimchanok Senakham, and against the Defaulted Defendants Alfredo Castillo, Rolando Bucago, Henry VIII Shabu Shabu Restaurant, LLC, Katana-Ya Restaurant & Lounge, LLC and Tokyo Katana-Ya, LLC, as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIC RIVERA:
Damages - $50,170.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,021.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,956.00.
Costs - 363.16.
Minus $500,00 Credit.
Total - $61,010.16.

PLAINTIFF SUWAPRON FANGSEN:
Damages - $44,110.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,718.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,956.00.
Costs - 363.16.
Minus $500,00 Credit.
Total - $53,647.16.

PLAINTIFF CHANTHRAPHAK MONGKHONSAWAT:
Damages - $57,838.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,182.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,956.00.
Costs - 363.16.
Minus $500,00 Credit.
Total - $69,839.16.

FOR PLAINTIFF PIMCHANOK SENAKHAM:
Damages - $51,130.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,978.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,956.00.
Costs - 363.16.
Minus $500,00 Credit.
Total - $61,927.16.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
